gameTitle: The Legend of Zelda: Spirit Tracks

achievements.title: Extra Credit
achievements.description: Starting in Aboda Village, pass your final exam with at least 128 seconds left on the clock.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Fresh from the Academy
achievements.description: Acquire the Recruit's Sword and train under Russell, the Captain of the Guard.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Teamwork Makes the Dream Work
achievements.description: Have Zelda possess a Phantom for the first time.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Up-and-Coming Musician
achievements.description: Learn a song on the Spirit Flute.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Syrinx Sage
achievements.description: Learn all five songs on the Spirit Flute.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Forest Mapper
achievements.description: Obtain the Forest Railmap.

achievements.title: Snow Mapper
achievements.description: Obtain the Snow Railmap.

achievements.description: Obtain the Ocean Railmap.

achievements.title: Fire Mapper
achievements.description: Obtain the Fire Railmap.

achievements.title: The Tunnel at the End of the Light
achievements.description: Obtain the Compass of Light and reveal the location of the Dark Realm.

achievements.title: Whispers from the Forest
achievements.description: Clear the Forest Temple.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Howls from the Tundra
achievements.description: Clear the Snow Temple.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Roars from the Sea
achievements.description: Clear the Ocean Temple.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Rumbles from the Volcano
achievements.description: Clear the Fire Temple.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Echoes from the Desert
achievements.description: Clear the Sand Temple.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: The Beginning of a Pastime
achievements.description: Collect your first stamp.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: A Sheet Filled
achievements.description: Collect five stamps.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Stamp Hobbyist
achievements.description: Collect ten stamps.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: First-Class Collector
achievements.description: Collect fifteen stamps.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Philately Phanatic
achievements.description: Collect all twenty stamps.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Rookie Rabbit Rescuer
achievements.description: Rescue a rabbit for the first time.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Trainee Rabbit Rescuer
achievements.description: Rescue 5 rabbits.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Regular Rabbit Rescuer
achievements.description: Rescue 10 rabbits.

achievements.title: Veteran Rabbit Rescuer
achievements.description: Rescue 25 rabbits.

achievements.title: Legendary Rabbit Rescuer
achievements.description: Rescue all 50 rabbits.

achievements.title: Forest Cuniculture
achievements.description: Rescue all ten grass rabbits.

achievements.title: Snow Cuniculture
achievements.description: Rescue all ten snow rabbits.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Ocean Cuniculture
achievements.description: Rescue all ten ocean rabbits.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Fire Cuniculture
achievements.description: Rescue all ten mountain rabbits.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Sand Cuniculture
achievements.description: Rescue all ten desert rabbits.

achievements.title: Duet with the Cellist
achievements.description: Complete your duet with Gage and open the path to the Forest Temple.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Duet with the Lutenist
achievements.description: Complete your duet with Steem and open the path to the Snow Temple.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Duet with the Flautist
achievements.description: Complete your duet with Carben and open the path to the Ocean Temple.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Duet with the Timpanist
achievements.description: Complete your duet with Embrose and open the path to the Fire Temple.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Duet with the Shawmist
achievements.description: Complete your duet with Rael and open the path to the Sand Temple.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Duet with the Divine
achievements.description: Complete your duet with Zelda and reveal Malladus's weak point.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: The Price of Loyalty
achievements.description: Get your Beedle Club Card in the mail.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Buy Nine, Get One Free
achievements.description: Get your Silver Card in the mail.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Persistent Patron
achievements.description: Get your Gold Card in the mail.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Top Investor
achievements.description: Get your Platinum Card in the mail.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Chairman of the Board
achievements.description: Get your Diamond Card in the mail.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Help Wanted
achievements.description: Collect 5 Force Gems.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: The Gift of Charity
achievements.description: Collect 10 Force Gems.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Premier Engineer
achievements.description: Collect all Force Gems and completely restore the Spirit Tracks.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Third Intention
achievements.description: Score a total of 90 single hits in a row during training without getting hit yourself.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Whip It Good
achievements.description: Finish the whip race within 1:05.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Fourteen High Tons
achievements.description: Get a score of 2100 or higher at the Goron Target Range.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Sharpshooter
achievements.description: Get a combo of 35 or more in the Pirate Hideout minigame.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Keep Both Eyes Open
achievements.description: Get a score of 4500 or more in the Pirate Hideout minigame.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Blitz upon the Few
achievements.description: Complete Level 1 of Take 'Em All On! with an in-game time of 6:10 or less.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Blitz upon the Many
achievements.description: Complete Level 2 of Take 'Em All On! with an in-game time of 12:10 or less.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Blitz upon All
achievements.description: Complete Level 3 of Take 'Em All On! with an in-game time of 27:30 or less.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Walk It Off
achievements.description: Complete Level 3 of Take 'Em All On! without recovering any life energy.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Treasure Hunter
achievements.description: Obtain one of every type of treasure.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Engineering in Style
achievements.description: Acquire any of the gold train parts.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Heartthrob
achievements.description: Collect all thirteen Heart Containers.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Where We're Going, We Don't Need Railroads
achievements.description: Activate all Spacetime Gates.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: The Art of War
achievements.description: Obtain both Swordsman's Scrolls.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Armed to the Teeth
achievements.description: Acquire all bow and bomb upgrades.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Plus Shipping and Handling
achievements.description: Deliver your first batch of Mega Ice to Goron Village from Wellspring Station without losing more than 7 lots of ice.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Kiss and Cry
achievements.description: Complete the Champion Course at Slippery Station and take the treasure.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Crabshell Cracker
achievements.description: Defeat all three Rocktites.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Shoo, Fly, Shoo
achievements.description: Defeat Stagnox without taking damage.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Quick Draw
achievements.description: Proceed to Fraaz's third phase before either Fraaz Jr. has a chance to resurrect the other or run away.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Guide My Hand
achievements.description: Defeat Phytops within 2:15.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Be Efficient
achievements.description: Defeat Cragma without using any more than 20 arrows.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: A Swift Dispatching
achievements.description: Defeat Byrne within 1:48.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Enemy Without
achievements.description: Defeat Dark Link.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: By Steam Alone
achievements.description: Defeat Malladus's final phase without using any potions.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: The Tracks Go On
achievements.description: Save New Hyrule from the resurrection of Malladus.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor
